name: rcs-message-skill
description: RCS Message, the upgraded 5G intelligent SMS, supports mass sending and forwarding of text and template messages directly via phone numbers, with no app download required. Backed by carrier real-name security, it can deliver images, videos and interactive cards, enabling one-stop services including inquiry, payment and business handling.
readme:
# longbiao515/rcs-message-skill

RCS Message, the upgraded 5G intelligent SMS, supports mass sending and forwarding of text and template messages directly via phone numbers, with no app download required. Backed by carrier real-name security, it can deliver images, videos and interactive cards, enabling one-stop services including inquiry, payment and business handling.
readmeHtml:
longbiao515/rcs-message-skill

RCS Message, the upgraded 5G intelligent SMS, supports mass sending and forwarding of text and template messages directly via phone numbers, with no app download required. Backed by carrier real-name security, it can deliver images, videos and interactive cards, enabling one-stop services including inquiry, payment and business handling.
